column1: Title: Medicaid Expansion Enrollment | KFF State Health Facts

column4: Expansion Group - Not Newly Eligible Enrollment
column6: Expansion Enrollment as a Percent of Total Enrollment

column1: Enrollment from the Medicaid Budget and Expenditure System (MBES) is reported for each month.

KFF analysis of Medicaid enrollment data collected from the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) [Medicaid Budget and Expenditure System (MBES)](https://www.medicaid.gov/medicaid/national-medicaid-chip-program-information/medicaid-chip-enrollment-data/medicaid-enrollment-data-collected-through-mbes/index.html).
*Expansion Group Enrollment*: Total number of adults who have enrolled in Medicaid as a result of the ACA expansion of the program.
*Expansion Group - Newly Eligible Enrollment*: Adults in the expansion group who were made newly eligible for Medicaid by the ACA Medicaid expansion.
*Expansion Group - Not Newly Eligible Enrollment*: Enrollees in the expansion group who were eligible for Medicaid through pre-ACA eligibility pathways.
*N/A*: Not applicable. State did not expand Medicaid as of reported month.
